The value of PB7 is inverted.
Now PB==1 will pass through a
low signal, which will clear U24
Note that PB7 is also tied to
that PB7 must be set back

The Qh output of U24 will be be 0 until the
start bit arrives and the next clock edge
occurs. Until then, the keyboard can drive
the data line and no IRQ is generated.
One the start bit arrives, IRQ1 is triggered
and the data line is pulled low.
